# Akshar Foshan — Hospitality FF&E Manufacturer

> Akshar Foshan is a vertically integrated hospitality FF&E manufacturer based in Foshan, Guangdong, China. We design, engineer, and manufacture premium furniture, fixtures, and equipment for hotels worldwide, serving 240+ hotel brands across 5+ continents.

## Company

- Name: Akshar Foshan
- Location: Foshan, Guangdong, China
- Phone: +1-760-617-0800
- Email: yogin@aksharfoshan.com
- Website: https://aksharfoshan.com
- Representatives: Dubai (UAE), Riyadh (Saudi Arabia)

## Products & Services

- **Casegoods**: Nightstands, dressers, desks, armoires, media consoles
- **Upholstery**: Headboards, sofas, chairs, ottomans
- **Lighting**: Chandeliers, wall sconces, table lamps, pendant lights
- **Bathroom FF&E**: Vanity units, mirrors, towel racks, hardware
- **Art & Decor**: Wall art, sculptures, accent pieces
- **Custom Design**: In-house design team for bespoke FF&E solutions

## Hotel Brand Clients

IHG, Hilton, Marriott, Choice Hotels, Wyndham, Hyatt, Best Western, Radisson, and 240+ additional hotel brands worldwide.

## Key Facts

- 13+ vertically integrated manufacturing facilities
- 100% finished-goods inspection with photographic documentation
- Third-party QC available: SGS, Bureau Veritas, TUV
- Standard lead time: 8–12 weeks
- Repeat program lead time: 6–8 weeks
- Shipping: FOB and DDP options
- Minimum order: typically 25–30 rooms (flexible for boutique projects)

## Primary Topics

- Hospitality FF&E manufacturing and supply
- Hotel furniture production in Foshan, China
- FF&E procurement for new-build and renovation hotel projects
- Custom hotel furniture design and engineering
- Hotel casegoods, upholstery, lighting, and bathroom FF&E
- Quality control and logistics for hospitality FF&E
